content.thinking:
The user wants me to fix a multi-tenant Spark environment on Kubernetes. Let me apply the three fixes described:

1. Fix History Server PVC reference
2. Fix History Server log directory
3. Fix Team A RoleBinding namespace

Let me run these commands sequentially and verify the results.

input.command: kubectl get rolebinding spark-role-binding -n spark-team-a -o yaml 2>&1; echo "---"; kubectl describe deployment spark-history-server -n spark-history 2>&1 | grep -A 20 "Volumes:\|Environment:"
input.description: Inspect RoleBinding and History Server config before patching

content.content:
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1","kind":"RoleBinding","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-role-binding","namespace":"spark-team-a"},"roleRef":{"apiGroup":"rbac.authorization.k8s.io","kind":"Role","name":"spark-role"},"subjects":[{"kind":"ServiceAccount","name":"spark","namespace":"spark-team-a"}]}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-25T16:44:20Z"
  name: spark-role-binding
  namespace: spark-team-a
  resourceVersion: "1136523"
  uid: ed090992-fe16-4d32-b8a3-f22796c0652b
roleRef:
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
  kind: Role
  name: spark-role
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: spark
  namespace: spark-team-a
---
    Environment:
      SPARK_HISTORY_OPTS:  -Dspark.history.fs.logDirectory=/mnt/spark-logs -Dspark.history.fs.update.interval=5s -Dspark.history.ui.port=18080
      SPARK_NO_DAEMONIZE:  true
    Mounts:
      /mnt/spark-logs from spark-logs (rw)
  Volumes:
   spark-logs:
    Type:          PersistentVolumeClaim (a reference to a PersistentVolumeClaim in the same namespace)
    ClaimName:     spark-history-pvc
    ReadOnly:      false
  Node-Selectors:  <none>
  Tolerations:     <none>
Conditions:
  Type           Status  Reason
  ----           ------  ------
  Available      True    MinimumReplicasAvailable
  Progressing    True    NewReplicaSetAvailable

content.thinking:
Interesting - it looks like the History Server already has the correct PVC name (`spark-history-pvc`) and the correct log directory (`/mnt/spark-logs`). The RoleBinding also already has `namespace: spark-team-a`. So it seems like these fixes may have already been applied, or the environment was set up slightly differently than described.

Let me check the current state of the jobs and see if there are any actual issues.

content.text: The environment already shows the correct values for the History Server PVC and RoleBinding. Let me check the actual job status and logs to see if there are real issues.
